label: FACIS Simulation — Observability & Errors
info:
FACIS Simulation — Observability & Errors

  GET /metrics — Prometheus text-format scrape endpoint exposing
    facis_sim_ticks_total, facis_kafka_messages_sent_total,
    facis_mqtt_messages_sent_total, facis_modbus_requests_total,
    and facis_sim_publish_latency_seconds.

  Catch nodes route uncaught errors from any tab into a structured
  JSON log line and a Kafka DLQ topic `sim.dead_letter`.

Metric counters live in global context under `metrics.<name>`.

name: build prometheus text
log + DLQ
increment counter
